query_normalized: predicting the impact of alloying on high-temperature oxidation resistance materials science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b): it measures the same mechanism (high-temperature oxidation resistance at 1000-1100°C) and the same dependent variable (oxidation protection/barrier performance) on the same domain (Ni-based superalloys and MAX phase coatings). The comparison between Ti2AlC and Cr2AlC directly addresses how different alloying/composition affects oxidation resistance, which is the core of the user's research question.
